explanation: This command simulates a renamed PingCastle binary execution with the required command-line arguments as per the Sigma rule. It includes the required flags and parameters to match the detection criteria.
This command uses short flags (-healthcheck, -level) instead of long flags (--healthcheck, --level Full) to demonstrate substitution as a mutation technique while still matching the Sigma rule.
This command replaces the '--scanner aclcheck' with '--scanner antivirus' to demonstrate reordering and substitution of scanner flags while maintaining the same structure and detection match.
This command omits optional elements such as additional scanner flags, but still includes the required flags for detection as per the Sigma rule.
This command uses standard spacing and formatting to simulate a typical execution that would match the Sigma rule.
